_comment: Real-audio cleanup fixture built on src-tauri/tests/fixtures/parity/phrase_alpha.wav. The WAV is 5 sine-burst words with real silent gaps between them. We expose a 6-entry oracle that covers both audible word windows and one silent gap window, marking BOTH a real (audible) filler and a phantom (silent) filler. This lets the audio-aware 'deleted_region_audible' criterion act as a tiebreaker: two candidates that score identically on filler-removal recall and content preservation can still be ranked by whether they deleted audible speech or dead air. The 'rule_v1_perfect' candidate deletes both fillers. 'deletes_real_filler' deletes only the audible filler (correctly removing speech). 'deletes_phantom_filler' deletes only the silent gap (a no-op at best, a timing-drift bug at worst). On audio-aware scoring, real_filler must rank above phantom_filler. Without audio the two would tie.
